buckets.definition: GPUs, custom AI ASICs, and data-centre Ethernet switches that form the compute layer of AI infrastructure.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Symbol master must confirm data-centre compute, AI accelerator, or data-centre networking exposure.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic cloud/software names must not appear; exposure must be to AI compute hardware, not software or services.

buckets.definition: Power management systems, switchgear, transformers, and cooling infrastructure for data centres and the power grid.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Evidence must describe transformer, switchgear, power management, or cooling product exposure from company profile or ETF/industry mapping.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic industrial conglomerates without specific power/electrical segment evidence stay monitor-only.

buckets.definition: Electricity generators with significant nuclear baseload capacity or power contracts serving data-centre operators.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Utilities require explicit nuclear, baseload, data-centre, or power contract evidence. Broad utilities without nuclear exposure stay monitor-only.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Utilities with no nuclear capacity or data-centre power contracts must not enter as active candidates.

buckets.definition: Uranium miners and producers. Must not be mixed with nuclear operators — separate supply chain.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Revenue or production evidence from uranium mining, processing, or fuel fabrication required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Nuclear operators (utilities) must not appear in this bucket. Only uranium miners and fuel cycle companies.

buckets.definition: Companies involved in uranium enrichment and HALEU production required by advanced reactor designs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: HALEU/enrichment requires official source or curated evidence. LLM-only suggestions stay proposed.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Companies without direct enrichment or HALEU production evidence must remain needs_review.

buckets.definition: Nuclear reactor services, SMR technology, and advanced reactor fuel solutions.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Nuclear reactor manufacturing, SMR development, or advanced nuclear fuel evidence required from company profile or official source.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Pre-revenue SMR companies without NRC or government contract evidence should be route-limited.

buckets.definition: Copper miners benefiting from AI power infrastructure and grid expansion. Adjacent to nuclear/energy but kept separate.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Revenue purity to copper required. Diversified miners need copper segment evidence.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Copper branch must not mix with nuclear operators or uranium unless both drivers explicitly active.

buckets.definition: Companies with primary revenue from approved GLP-1 obesity and diabetes drugs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Primary pharmaceutical revenue from approved GLP-1 drugs (tirzepatide, semaglutide, or equivalents) required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Clinical-stage companies without approved drug revenue must not appear as direct leaders.

buckets.definition: Clinical-stage companies developing next-generation obesity and metabolic treatments.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Clinical trial data or company pipeline evidence required. Must be clearly labelled as catalyst-driven.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Do not treat as direct revenue leaders. Clinical failure is a binary risk.

buckets.definition: Supply-chain companies providing peptide manufacturing, fill-finish capacity, and injectable delivery systems for GLP-1 drugs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Evidence must describe manufacturing, packaging, or injectable systems for pharmaceutical production.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Life-science tools without specific GLP-1 manufacturing or delivery evidence must not be included.

buckets.definition: Diagnostic testing and metabolic monitoring devices with mixed exposure from GLP-1 disease management changes.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Metabolic, diabetes, or obesity diagnostic/monitoring evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Names with negative GLP-1 exposure (device pressure) must be marked monitor-only or mixed.

buckets.definition: Health insurers and pharmacy benefit managers with mixed GLP-1 coverage cost vs long-term savings exposure.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Health insurer or PBM evidence required. Mixed exposure classification mandatory.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Never classify as directional; always monitor-only unless evidence clearly supports one direction.

buckets.definition: Consumer food and restaurant companies facing volume headwinds from GLP-1-driven appetite reduction.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Calorie-dense food or restaurant revenue evidence required. Classify as monitor-only or negative exposure.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Never automatic short/long. Monitor-only with negative/mixed exposure classification.

buckets.definition: Large-cap prime contractors with multi-year government defence backlogs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Order backlog, segment exposure, and government customer evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Commercial aerospace names require defence segment evidence; do not include on name recognition alone.

buckets.definition: Companies producing missile systems, air defence systems, and munitions.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Contract, backlog, or news evidence linking company to active missile or air defence programme required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Pure services companies without hardware production evidence must not appear here.

buckets.definition: Companies building US Navy ships, submarines, and naval combat systems.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Official segment mapping to naval/shipbuilding programme required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic industrials without specific naval system evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Drone manufacturers, autonomous weapons, defence IT, and space/reconnaissance companies.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Defence customer or government contract evidence required. Route as tactical/swing unless structural.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic tech companies without defence-specific evidence must not appear in this bucket.

buckets.definition: Defence-focused ETFs providing basket exposure.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be an ETF/ETP with documented defence/aerospace holdings.
buckets.exclusion_rule: ETF holdings can propose candidates but cannot bypass evidence gate for individual symbols.

buckets.definition: Large-cap enterprise security platform providers.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Product and segment exposure to enterprise endpoint, network, or firewall security required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic IT companies without security-specific product evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Cloud-native SASE and zero-trust network access platforms.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Company description and revenue mix must confirm SASE, zero-trust, or cloud-native security exposure.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic cloud/SaaS companies without security-specific evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Identity and access management, privileged access management, and data security platforms.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Specific IAM/PAM/data-security product evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: General enterprise software companies without identity/access product evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Data backup, ransomware recovery, and cyber resilience platforms.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Cyber resilience or ransomware recovery product evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic storage companies without cyber resilience evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Cybersecurity ETFs providing basket exposure.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be a cybersecurity-focused ETF/ETP.
buckets.exclusion_rule: ETF holdings can propose candidates only.

buckets.definition: Wafer fabrication equipment, process control, and testing for semiconductor fabs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: CHIPS Act project, semiconductor fab equipment product, or company data required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Separate fabs/equipment/testing — random semiconductor names without equipment/fab evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Industrial automation systems, process controls, and robotics for domestic manufacturing.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Company profile evidence of industrial automation, process control, or factory systems required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic industrials without specific automation evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Engineering, construction, and electrical contractors executing industrial capex projects.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Project backlog or contract evidence for semiconductor fab or industrial construction required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic construction companies without industrial/tech project evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Steel, cement, and aggregates consumed in factory and infrastructure construction.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Domestic construction or capex demand cycle evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Commodity cyclicals require separate cycle/risk notes. Do not classify as structural.

buckets.definition: Infrastructure and industrial ETFs providing basket exposure.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be an ETF with documented US infrastructure or industrial holdings.
buckets.exclusion_rule: ETF holdings can propose candidates only.

buckets.definition: National and regional homebuilders with direct exposure to mortgage rate changes.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Homebuilder revenue evidence and permits/starts/order/backlog data required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Materials and retail companies must appear in separate buckets.

buckets.definition: Structural building products, insulation, roofing, and interior products for homebuilders.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Supplier relationship to homebuilders or construction industry evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Must not appear in homebuilder bucket — separate supply chain classification.

buckets.definition: Retailers serving the repair, remodel, and new construction market.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Retail revenue from home improvement, repair, or remodel product sales required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Not the same as new construction — repair/remodel cycle differs.

buckets.definition: Mortgage originators, title insurers, and real estate services.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Mortgage origination, title insurance, or real estate transaction service evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Rate-sensitive; high volatility — must be labelled for rate risk.

buckets.definition: Homebuilder and building industry ETFs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be a housing-focused ETF/ETP.
buckets.exclusion_rule: ETF holdings can propose candidates only.

buckets.definition: Regulated investor-owned water utilities.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Regulated water utility revenue and rate-case evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic utilities without water utility classification must not appear.

buckets.definition: Water treatment and testing companies. Water-specific evidence required.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Water treatment, purification, or testing product/service evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Life-science tools do not auto-qualify on water keyword alone.

buckets.definition: Flow control, metering, and infrastructure products for water networks.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Water-specific pump, valve, or meter product evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic industrial pump companies without water infrastructure evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Water-focused ETFs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be a water-focused ETF.
buckets.exclusion_rule: ETF holdings can propose candidates only.

buckets.definition: Pure-play and primary copper miners.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Revenue purity to copper required. Diversified miners need copper segment evidence.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Diversified miners without copper purity score must not appear as pure copper names.

buckets.definition: Lithium producers and battery material companies. Separate from copper bucket.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Lithium or battery material production evidence required. Only activate if battery/EV driver is active.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Must remain separate from copper miners unless active driver includes battery materials.

buckets.definition: Rare earth miners and processors.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Rare earth mining or processing evidence required. Geopolitical supply-chain driver required for activation.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Generic mining companies without rare earth evidence must not appear.

buckets.definition: Copper and critical minerals ETFs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be a copper or critical minerals focused ETF.
buckets.exclusion_rule: ETF holdings can propose candidates only.

buckets.definition: Gold bullion ETPs providing direct price exposure.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be a physically-backed gold bullion ETP.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Not a company exposure — ETP structure only.

buckets.definition: Large-cap gold mining companies.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Mine cost, jurisdiction risk, and production volume evidence required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Real-rate and USD drivers should influence route, not blindly add miners.

buckets.definition: Gold and precious metals royalty and streaming companies.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Royalty or streaming contract evidence required. Different risk profile from operators.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Must remain a separate bucket from miners due to different risk profile.

buckets.definition: Junior gold miner ETFs with higher beta.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be a gold miner or precious metals ETF.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Silver/mining ETFs should not enter if driver is central-bank gold only.

buckets.definition: SEC-approved spot Bitcoin ETPs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be an SEC-approved spot Bitcoin ETP. ETP route only.
buckets.exclusion_rule: No direct operating company exposure in this bucket.

buckets.definition: Crypto exchange and platform companies.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Revenue evidence from crypto exchange, custody, or subscription services required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Must be clearly labelled for regulatory and volume-cycle risk.

buckets.definition: Companies holding Bitcoin as a treasury reserve.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Balance-sheet Bitcoin evidence required. High volatility controls mandatory.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Must not be classified as direct leader — balance-sheet proxy only.

buckets.definition: Bitcoin mining companies.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Mining operations evidence, energy cost, and balance-sheet risk assessment required.
buckets.exclusion_rule: Mining economics required — not just holding Bitcoin.

buckets.definition: Blockchain and crypto-focused ETFs.
buckets.inclusion_rule: Must be a blockchain or digital asset focused ETF.
buckets.exclusion_rule: ETF holdings can propose candidates only.
